title: Create: Molten Processing
description: An addon to Create Molten Metals that adds a full ore processing line.
body:
This is an addon to [Create: Molten Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-molten-metals) that adds a full ore processing line.

- Melting down raw ore now gives you 1.5x the material, as well as the byproduct you would have gotten from washing it at half odds.
- Alloys made when molten are now 33% more efficient.
- You can now crush flint to get a 10% chance of getting slag.
- Crushing Slag now gives less flint and more nuggets, including lead & silver from [oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized).

When put all together these are the results you can get!
![More than just 1.5x ore processing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ce5873e4a49bc2b4805992d5fcd0ac96729b80.png)
